title: Lum (Backport)
description: This is a backport of Lum by paulevs
body:
This is a backport of Lum by paulevs (https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/lum) for 1.12.2  
Lum adds emissive textures (Glowing textures) to various blocks from BetterNether.  
This backports the textures from the 1.16 version of Lum, as well as adds some missing emissive textures and removes unused ones for the 1.12.2 version of BetterNether.

Permission under gallery tab.
